meanings.definition: using or intended for the left hand

examples: in Colonial America left-handed marriages between Frenchmen and Indians were frequent

meanings.definition: (of marriages) of a marriage between one of royal or noble birth and one of lower rank; valid but with the understanding that the rank of the inferior remains unchanged and offspring do not succeed to titles or property of the superior
lacking physical movement skills, especially with the hands; ; ; ; - Mary H. Vorse
examples: could scarcely empty a scuttle of ashes, so handless was the poor creature
